summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact hydrates 20 refs; hydrated open PRs are kept independent unless a specific maintainer decision blocks automation. Already-closed PRs are kept closed with skipped actions. The remaining 20 job refs are absent from the compacted preflight item matrix, so they are scoped needs_human for refreshed hydration before any classification or mutation.
